description_long: This is a large, boxy cabinet or shelf structure with three solid, dark-colored walls and an open front. The interior and exterior surfaces are decorated with a black, white, and red checkerboard stripe running horizontally along the walls, and the lower portions of the side walls show visible stains and wear, suggesting heavy use or neglect. The floor is covered in a black-and-white checkered tile pattern, and the lighting creates a dramatic, focused spot in the center. Inside, there is a small brown table and a green, humanoid animatronic figure, both positioned centrally. The overall appearance is industrial and utilitarian, with a slightly ominous or themed aesthetic reminiscent of entertainment venues or themed urban environments. The structure is large enough for a person to enter and stand inside comfortably.
description: A large, open-fronted cabinet or booth with dark, checker-striped walls and a checkered tile floor, containing a table and a green animatronic figure.
description_view_0: The open front of the cabinet is visible, showing the dark interior and checkered floor.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the checkerboard stripe and visible stains on the lower wall.
description_view_2: The interior is fully visible, showing the table and green animatronic figure on the checkered floor.
description_view_3: The opposite side wall is shown, with more stains and the checkerboard stripe.
